continuationFix.finding: Direct npm.cmd spawn with shell false is not a reliable Windows execution path after root lock materialization
remediation: use the absolute npm CLI path supplied by npm run and execute it through process.execPath when available
validate that npm_execpath is absolute and exists before using it
retain an explicit Windows command-shell fallback only when a trusted npm CLI path is unavailable
preserve exact npm audit arguments: audit --audit-level=high --omit=dev
execute a static cross-platform invocation regression in Full Multimodal Asset Audit
